meta.purpose: Machine-readable retrospect trigger and escalation rules for the Retrospect Trigger Detector

trigger_signals.name: User Correction
trigger_signals.description: User explicitly contradicts or corrects the Agent

trigger_signals.name: Retrospect Intent
trigger_signals.description: User explicitly asks to improve the Skill

trigger_signals.name: AI Self-Discovery
trigger_signals.description: Agent discovers a gap during its own review or sweep
scenarios: checklist item should have caught this but didn't
Node 4 caught something that should have been caught earlier
content consistency sweep finds recurring stale references from the same root cause

escalation_levels.trigger: Single stylistic preference or local PRD fix
User correction x1; same root cause x1; P2/P3 self-discovery
Same root cause x2; P1 systemic; user expresses retrospect intent
escalation_levels.next_step: Agent asks user at Node 5 whether to enter retrospect

escalation_levels.trigger: Same root cause x3+; any P0 gate failure
escalation_levels.note: T3 forces generation of the retrospect PROPOSAL, not application of patches. Per-patch user confirmation is still required.

escalation_rules: T3 forces generation of the retrospect PROPOSAL, not application of patches.
Per-patch user confirmation is still required at every level.
A one-time preference must never auto-escalate to a universal rule.
Trigger state rows aggregate by governed root cause, not by source or workflow node.
Occurrence count escalates at 1=T1, 2=T2, and 3+=T3; an explicit higher severity is preserved.
The aggregate row keeps latest evidence while user correction records preserve the full event trail.

root_causes.label: 缺方法
root_causes.meaning: Missing analysis method, workflow rule, judgment path

root_causes.label: 缺模板
root_causes.meaning: Missing table template, output slot, fixed structure

root_causes.label: 缺门禁
root_causes.meaning: Gate should have blocked but didn't, check should have run but didn't

root_causes.label: 缺案例
root_causes.meaning: Rule exists but lacks example → Agent applies it incorrectly
